summary: First iteration: end-to-end backend + frontend testing of PaperTrail. All 16 backend pytest cases passed (root, meta, documents CRUD-read, search RAG in English/Hindi with LLM, Maharashtra-specific search, silent Tavily fallback query, translate to Hindi with Devanagari verification, English passthrough, and all auth-guard 401 checks). Frontend homepage loaded with hero, header selectors, state chips, sample queries, and 8 category cards. Search flow works: input->submit navigates to /search, loading state appears, then result-summary/steps/fees/time/portal/required-docs/tips all render. Confidence badge renders (green VERIFIED). Open-full-process navigates to /doc/{id}, checklist ul contains 8 items each toggleable. Hindi language switch produces answer with Devanagari characters. Browse page and category filter work.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py get_document iterates linearly; fine for 82 docs but consider dict lookup for scale.
auth cookie set with SameSite=None+Secure; correct for cross-site OAuth but ensure prod HTTPS.
Search endpoint has no rate limiting or query-length validation — could allow abuse of LLM key.
test_credentials: None used; standard Google OAuth not exercised end-to-end per instructions. Only 401 guards validated.
seed_data_creation: None (82 docs are file-based from data/karnataka.json + maharashtra.json).
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all core endpoints incl LLM/Tavily flows. Frontend UI test-ids are all present and correctly wired. If future changes touch search/RAG or translate, rerun pytest — LLM tests take ~30s each so full run ~55s.
